# Propertize — Beyond Stays

> Propertize S.r.l. is an Italian vacation rental company specializing in short-term rentals (affitti brevi) across Sardinia, Milan, and Sicily. Based in Milan, the company manages curated villas, apartments, and houses, publishing them on 50+ international booking platforms. Philosophy: "Beyond Stays — vivi come un local."

## Company Overview

Propertize S.r.l. is a property management and vacation rental company headquartered at Piazza della Repubblica 19, Milano, Italy. The company provides end-to-end management of short-term rental properties, from professional photography and interior design optimization to dynamic pricing, guest assistance, and maintenance. Properties are listed across more than 50 international platforms including Airbnb, Booking.com, and Vrbo. Propertize offers multilingual 24/7 guest support and has demonstrated revenue increases of 58-119% for managed properties compared to owner self-management.

## Destinations

### Sardinia (Sardegna)
- **Golfo Aranci** — Crystal-clear beaches and fishing villages in northeast Sardinia. Known for Spiaggia Bianca and dolphin-watching excursions.
- **Costa Smeralda** — Luxury Mediterranean coastline in northeast Sardinia. Porto Cervo, Porto Rotondo, and some of Italy's most exclusive beaches.
- **Alghero** — Catalan-influenced city on Sardinia's northwest Coral Riviera. Medieval old town, Neptune's Grotto, and spectacular sunsets.
- **Villasimius** — Hidden coves and pristine nature in southeast Sardinia. Capo Carbonara marine protected area.
- **Nuoro & Barbagia** — Authentic inland Sardinia with mountain traditions, pastoral culture, and hiking trails through gorges and Mediterranean scrubland.
- **Torre dei Corsari / Costa Verde** — Golden dunes and open sea on Sardinia's west coast. Ideal for trekking and nature experiences.

### Lombardy (Lombardia)
- **Milano** — Design, fashion, and aperitivo culture in Italy's economic capital. Central apartments ideal for business travelers and city breaks.

### Sicily (Sicilia)
- Expanding operations (coming soon).

## Property Types

| Type | Italian | Description |
|------|---------|-------------|
| Villas | Ville | Standalone homes, often with pools and gardens |
| Apartments | Appartamenti | City and coastal apartments |
| Houses | Case | Traditional Sardinian and urban houses |
| Small Villas | Villette | Compact villas with private outdoor space |
| Studios | Studi | Compact units for solo travelers or couples |

## Guest Services

### What's Included in Every Stay
- Fully equipped kitchen
- Fast Wi-Fi
- Bed and bath linens
- Welcome kit with local Sardinian products
- Multilingual 24/7 guest assistance (Italian, English, and more)

### Additional Amenities (Select Properties)
- Private parking
- Swimming pool
- Garden
- Sea view
- Pet-friendly accommodation

### Booking Process
1. Choose destination, dates, and property type on propertize.it
2. Select a property and book online with secure payment
3. Receive confirmation email with access instructions
4. Check-in managed by the Propertize team (instructions sent 24h before arrival)
5. 24/7 multilingual support throughout your stay

### Payment Methods
- Bank transfer
- Mastercard
- Visa

### Cancellation Policy
- 30+ days before arrival: 10% of booking amount
- 29 to 7 days before arrival: 50% of booking amount
- Less than 7 days before arrival: 100% of booking amount
- Early voluntary departure: no refund
- If property becomes unavailable: equivalent or superior property offered at no extra cost

### Pet Policy
Many properties are pet-friendly. Filter for pet-friendly properties during search. Notify at booking time to prepare the accommodation.

## Owner Services (Property Management)

Propertize provides full-service property management for vacation rental owners in Sardinia and Milan.

### Management Process
1. **Free Valuation** — Online property inspection and personalized revenue estimate
2. **Property Optimization** — Professional photography, interior design suggestions, aesthetic improvements
3. **Bureaucratic Management** — Permits, registrations, tax compliance, all legal requirements handled
4. **Booking & Pricing** — Publication on 50+ international platforms with dynamic pricing strategy
5. **Guest Assistance** — Multilingual 24/7 support, check-in/check-out, special requests, maintenance
6. **Cleaning & Maintenance** — Professional cleaning after each stay and regular property upkeep

### Owner Results (Case Studies)
| Property | Before Propertize | After Propertize | Revenue Increase |
|----------|-------------------|------------------|-----------------|
| Villa Azzurra | €21,370/year | €46,920/year | +119.5% |
| Cagliari Boutique | €11,250/year | €21,680/year | +92.7% |
| Magnifica Villa | €16,720/year | €27,330/year | +63.5% |
| Sun Terrace Home | €9,830/year | €15,620/year | +58.9% |

### Owner Testimonials
- **Rita Putzolu** (Janas Best Suites): "Il Team mi ha seguito fin dall'inizio con professionalita, correttezza e gentilezza" ★★★★★
- **Maximiliano Scanu** (Vintage Villa): Professional team with "competenza i punti di forza" ★★★★★
- **Emanuela Dentoni** (Il Villino Retro): "La collaborazione con Propertize e stata determinante nella gestione degli affitti" ★★★★★
- **Jessica D'Antuono** (Villetta moderna): "ragazzi fantastici presenti, professionali, pronti a risolvere" ★★★★★

## Experiences

### Culinary Experiences
Traditional Sardinian cuisine: culurgiones (stuffed pasta), porceddu (roast suckling pig), pecorino cheese, and local wines. Propertize connects guests with authentic food experiences.

### Outdoor & Nature
Trekking trails through coves, gorges, and Mediterranean scrubland. Coastal hikes, snorkeling, and diving in marine protected areas.

## Frequently Asked Questions

### How does booking work?
Choose your destination, dates, and property type on our website. After selecting a property, book directly online with secure payment. You'll receive a confirmation email with all check-in instructions.

### What is the cancellation policy?
Cancellation charges are progressive: 10% if cancelled 30+ days before arrival, 50% between 29-7 days, and 100% under 7 days. Full details in the General Conditions on our website.

### What's included in a stay?
Every stay includes equipped kitchen, fast Wi-Fi, bed and bath linens, a welcome kit with local products, and multilingual 24/7 guest assistance. Some properties also offer private parking, pool, and garden. Accepted payment methods: bank transfer, Mastercard, and Visa.

### Do you accept pets?
Yes, many properties are pet-friendly. Filter for pet-friendly properties during your search and notify us at booking time.

### How does check-in work?
Our team manages check-in and check-out for every property with multilingual 24/7 support. Access instructions are sent by email before arrival. Contact us anytime for special requests.

### How do I reach properties in Sardinia?
Sardinia is reachable by air (Olbia, Cagliari, and Alghero airports) or by ferry (Olbia, Porto Torres, Cagliari, and Golfo Aranci ports). After booking, we send detailed directions and car rental advice.
